{{CargoClone
|name=Useless Liu Shan
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=167
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Demon God Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
